stemHtml:
Which of these statements best describes the weather most likely to be experienced at 15:00 UTC?

TAF LSZH 211200Z 2113/2122 22018G35KT 9999 SCT012 BKN030 BECMG 2113/2115 25025G45KT TEMPO 2117/2120 4000 +SHRA BKN025TCU BECMG 2120/2122 25015KT TX18/15Z TN14/21Z=

options.a: Visibility 4 000 metres, gusts up to 25 knots, temperature 18°C.
options.b: Visibility 10 kilometres or more, ceiling 1 200 feet, gusts up to 45 knots.
options.c: Severe rain showers, visibility 4 000 metres, temperature 15 °C, gusts up to 35 knots.
options.d: Visibility 10 kilometres or more, ceiling 3 000 feet, wind 250, temperature 18°C.
